data.body: 7226 implementation COMPLETE (all 7 artifacts): completion_verifier.md (kinds+discriminator+injection-split+remediation+ADR links), VerdictFinding.remediation (TDD RED→GREEN), schema findings note, 4 eval fixtures + reworded pointwise-compatible grounding rubric + gold_set carve-out (validate_eval_spec=[]), unit test, ADR 0043, CLAUDE.md tag doc. make lint + typecheck GREEN; 72 directly-affected tests pass; full make test running.
